summary: Frontend-only testing of StickyCTA.jsx and SiteNavbar.jsx mobile fixes. All 17 test requirements passed. Global StickyCTA shows after scrolling 100px on homepage and other pages, correctly hidden on /thank-you-booking and /llm-info. Mobile menu now has 3 CTA buttons (Book Repair Online, Phone, Text Us) before Customer Portal button.
context_for_next_testing_agent: StickyCTA and SiteNavbar mobile fixes verified. Global StickyCTA shows after scrolling 100px on all pages except /thank-you-booking and /llm-info. Mobile menu has 3 CTA buttons before Customer Portal. No duplicate sticky bars.
